chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3593 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For order on MA No.19043/2025 (Urgent). 2. For order on MA No.19044/2025 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of case. 29.12.2025 Mr. Wajahat Naseem Khan, Advocate for Applicants a/w both applicants. -------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this Criminal Bail Application the applicants, namely, Shahid Ali and Zahid Ali, both sons of Muhammad Bux seek protective bail in Crime No.13/2024 for the offences under sections 302, 337-H, 324, 148, 149, 452, PPC registered at Police Station Daim Malik, District Shikarpur. Counsel for the applicants submits that the applicant have been falsely implicated in this case; that the applicants apprehend their arrest by the hands of the police, which humiliate them, therefore, they may be granted protective bail enabling them to approach and surrender before the trial Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants above-named are admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) each with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling them to approach and surrender before the trial Court for a period of fifteen days. In case the applicants do not surrender before the trial Court within the above stipulated period, the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited.

Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants above-named are admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) each with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling them to approach and surrender before the trial Court for a period of fifteen days. In case the applicants do not surrender before the trial Court within the above stipulated period, the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant Crl. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Farhan/PS
